title: HYZoFault red & black
description: A PvP resource pack in red and black. Perfekt for Smp's
body:
**Smaller handhelds** and a **clearer HUD** make it very good for PvP, and with the **low fire** and **low shield**, you will see again. 

Perfect for:

- PvP players who want a clean interface
- SMP players (HugoSMP-style)

![**HYZoFault** **vs** **VAnilla**](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a04fd0f27b6177dec822215e12e9224db597253a.png)![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e0d45c76de1e6d54bede701fec44b6f30b6903d.png)

**Diamond armor** in red, as well as the sword; dark **netherite armor**; red totem; darker buckets; dark bows and crossbows. 

**_Low Fire Preview_** :
